title: knautia montana subsp. involucrata
intro: Knautia montana subsp. involucrata, also known as the Shepherd's Needle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also known to have health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Knautia montana subsp. involucrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although its efficacy and safety are not thoroughly studied and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
